assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly recommends different strategies: autoscaled blue-green for L4 pool and custom two-phase strategy for A100 pool

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response recommends autoscaled blue-green upgrade instead of surge upgrade with maxSurge parameters

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response addresses GPU driver compatibility with specific staging tests and mentions TensorFlow/PyTorch framework compatibility checks

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response recommends pausing new fine-tuning job submissions and waiting for existing jobs to complete before upgrading the A100 pool

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'GPU VMs don't support live migration — every upgrade causes pod restarts' and mentions inference downtime

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific PDB configuration example with minAvailable: 80% for inference deployments

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response addresses autoscaler interaction by recommending pausing autoscaling or setting min=max during upgrade to avoid mixed-version states

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific staging cluster testing steps with GPU driver compatibility validation and CUDA driver testing
